_readme: VPP spawn-name classification, maintained BY HAND. A VPP TeleportManager bookmark named <Map>_<Category>_<ArbitraryName> (e.g. S_Mil_IslandBlockade) is parsed by Sync-VPPCoordinates.ps1 and mirrored into DynamicAIB groups by Build-AIBandits.ps1 (match->update, new->create, extra->remove). A known CATEGORY in field 2 makes it a spawn; SIZE is OPTIONAL - normally OMITTED so each spawn uses its template's default member count and you add DENSITY by adding more bookmarks. Insert _<Size>_ as field 3 only to override (e.g. S_Mil_L_IslandBlockade). categories: Category token -> a template name that MUST exist in common/DynamicAIB.common.json groupTemplates. sizes: OPTIONAL Size letter -> member-count override. maps: Map letter -> mission folder. A name whose field 2 is NOT a known category is coordinate-only (<Map>_<Name>): it only updates a same-named group's coords, never creates. Snipers use the per-map snipers[] spec, NOT this file. Edit freely and re-run Sync-VPPCoordinates.ps1 -Execute.
